title: Payment Gateway DB Connection Pool Upgrade
description: Increase database connection pool from 50 to 200 to handle peak load
justification: Multiple incidents (inc-001) caused by connection pool exhaustion

title: Add Redis Cache for User Sessions
description: Implement Redis caching layer for user session data to reduce DB load
justification: Performance optimization post-incident (inc-002)
testPlan: A/B test with 25% traffic to new cache path

title: Kafka Partition Scaling
description: Increase order event topic partitions from 3 to 6
justification: Resolve consumer lag issues (inc-003) during peak orders

title: Fraud Detection Model v3 Rollback
description: Rollback fraud detection from v3 to v2 due to performance regression
justification: Model v3 causing scoring timeouts (inc-004)
testPlan: Benchmark v2 vs v3 inference time

title: API Gateway Rate Limiting Fix
description: Fix rate limiting key extraction to use correct client identifier headers
justification: Legitimate traffic being rate limited (inc-005)
testPlan: Verify rate limiting with multi-client test

title: Elasticsearch Cluster Expansion
description: Add 2 additional Elasticsearch nodes and rebalance shards
justification: Disk space exhaustion caused search outages (inc-006)

title: Notification Template Engine Upgrade
description: Upgrade template engine to support recovery from render errors
justification: Email delivery failures due to template rendering issues
rollbackPlan: Keep old template engine as fallback

title: Inventory Sync API Contract Update
description: Update warehouse sync API to use versioned contracts
justification: Message format mismatch causing sync failures (inc-008)

title: Payment Transaction Index Optimization
description: Add database index on transaction_id and created_at for payment lookups
justification: Refund errors due to missing index (inc-009)

title: JWT Clock Skew Tolerance Update
description: Add 30-second clock skew tolerance for JWT token validation
justification: Premature token expiry due to NTP sync issues (inc-010)

title: Database Connection Leak Detection
description: Implement connection leak detection and automatic recovery
justification: Connection pool exhaustion incidents (inc-011)

title: CDN Cache Invalidation Pipeline
description: Implement automated cache invalidation on product updates
justification: Stale content delivery issues (inc-012)

title: Analytics Query Timeout Guard
description: Add query timeout and retry logic for ClickHouse queries
justification: Report generation failures due to query timeouts (inc-013)

title: Carrier API v2 Migration
description: Update carrier API integration to v2 with graceful fallback
justification: Carrier API v1 deprecation causing outages (inc-014)

title: ML Feature Pipeline Optimization
description: Parallelize feature computation pipeline for ML models
justification: 10x slower feature computation after refactor (inc-015)

title: Audit DB Schema Migration Fix
description: Fix missing column in TimescaleDB audit hypertable
justification: Audit log ingestion failures (inc-016)

title: Config Service Cache Resilience
description: Add cache corruption detection and auto-recovery for config service
justification: Config service outage due to corrupted cache (inc-017)

title: Redis Eviction Policy Review
description: Review and update Redis eviction policy to prevent cart data loss
justification: Cart data loss under memory pressure (inc-018)

title: Elasticsearch Product Index Optimization
description: Add missing indexes for product search fields
justification: Slow product search queries (inc-019)

title: Kafka Broker Disk Monitoring
description: Add disk usage monitoring and alerting for Kafka brokers
justification: Kafka broker disk failure caused message loss (inc-020)

title: International Shipping Rate Update
description: Update international shipping rate tables with current carrier pricing
justification: Outdated rates causing incorrect calculations (inc-021)

title: Optimistic Locking Retry Logic
description: Add retry logic for optimistic locking failures in profile updates
justification: User profile update failures due to concurrent updates (inc-022)

title: SSL Certificate Auto-Renewal
description: Implement automated SSL certificate renewal with monitoring
justification: Certificate expiry caused payment outage (inc-023)

title: Inventory Reconciliation Automation
description: Automate inventory reconciliation process with warehouse systems
justification: Stock discrepancies causing order issues (inc-024)

title: API Gateway Plugin Memory Fix
description: Fix memory leak in custom Kong rate limiting plugin
justification: Plugin crash causing gateway outage (inc-025)

title: Promotional Period Model Training
description: Retrain fraud detection model with promotion-period transaction data
justification: High false positive rate during sales events (inc-027)

title: Database Failover Automation
description: Improve automated failover with connection draining and validation
justification: Failover test did not meet SLA (inc-028)

title: Feature Flag Git Sync Fix
description: Fix Git backend sync for feature flag configuration
justification: Feature flags reverting due to Git merge conflicts (inc-030)

title: Registration Rate Limiting Implementation

title: Payment Reconciliation Timezone Fix
description: Fix timezone conversion bug in payment reconciliation
justification: Reconciliation discrepancies due to timezone bug (inc-032)

title: Redis Cluster Quorum Configuration

justification: Redis split-brain causing cart inconsistency (inc-033)

title: Order Service Memory Leak Fix
description: Fix unclosed database result sets in paginated order queries
justification: Memory leak causing pod OOM after 48h (inc-034)

title: API v1 Sunset Extension

title: Notification Consumer Auto-scaling
description: Implement auto-scaling for notification queue consumers based on queue depth
justification: Queue backlog during peak periods (inc-036)

title: Token Lifetime Configuration Audit

title: Kafka Broker Disk I/O Optimization
description: Investigate and resolve Kafka broker disk I/O bottlenecks
